Ntc Of Motion To Cont'D Hrg And Extend Arbitrators Appointment Beyond 120 Days
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Continue Arbitration Hearing and Extend Arbitrator's Appointment Beyond One Hundred Twenty Day, is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 3/29/02. Arbitration Order to Show Cause is re-set to 4/18/02 at 1:30 PM in department 212.
Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Diana Chen. (212)
